verse_text: And Jesus said to them, 'Can the friends of the bridegroom mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them? But the days will come when the bridegroom will be taken away from them, and then they will fast.

pericope.title: The New Wine of the Kingdom

links.context: Jesus' earthly life is a time of joyous blessings. But there will come a time when His followers will practice the fast (see notes on [[MAT.9:14]]-17; [[MRK.2:20]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: The strength of wine symbolizes the "new wine" of the new covenant ([[MAT.9:15]]- 17): the Holy Spirit uniting with and dwelling within men. St. Paul writes, "And do not be drunk with wine... but be filled with the Spirit" ([[EPH.5:18]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
